topic_definition: Vocabulary capturing traditional software-process, SDLC, and project-management language used in job descriptions: agile/scrum/kanban/waterfall methodologies, sprint and ceremony cadence, requirements engineering, specification authoring, V&V, project coordination, scheduling, milestones, change management, and governance. This is the classical process-and-methodology layer that orchestrates human teams building software, distinct from agentic-AI task orchestration and from correctness-gating verification.

concepts.name: Agile methodology
concepts.definition: Generic agile framing language: agile principles, agile delivery, agile mindset, agile transformation, agile coaching.
